metadata.raw_response_text:
:::writing
Subject: New Remote Work Policy – Effective Next Month

Hi everyone,

Over the past few years, the way we work has continued to evolve. After reviewing employee feedback, team performance data, and our long‑term goals as a company, we are introducing a new remote work policy that will take effect on May 1.

The goal of this policy is to provide greater flexibility for employees while maintaining strong collaboration across teams and ensuring we continue delivering high‑quality work for our customers.

New Remote Work Structure

• Employees may work remotely up to three days per week.  
• Each team will designate two core in‑office collaboration days. These days will be set by team managers to ensure key meetings and planning sessions happen face‑to‑face.  
• Employees who prefer to work in the office full time are always welcome to do so.  
• Fully remote arrangements may be approved in specific cases based on role requirements and manager approval.

Why We’re Making This Change

Our experience has shown that a balanced approach works best for most teams. Remote work offers flexibility and reduces commuting time, while regular in‑person collaboration supports creativity, faster decision‑making, and stronger relationships across the company. This updated policy is designed to capture the benefits of both.

What You Need to Do Next

1. Watch for a message from your team manager about your team’s designated in‑office days.  
2. Confirm your preferred weekly schedule with your manager by April 15.  
3. Review the updated Remote Work Guidelines that HR will share later this week.  
4. If you believe your role may qualify for a fully remote arrangement, discuss this with your manager before April 15.

HR will host two optional Q&A sessions next week to walk through the policy and answer any questions.

Thank you for your flexibility and for continuing to make this a great place to work. We’re excited to move forward with a structure that supports both collaboration and work‑life balance.

Best,  
People & Operations Team
:::
